text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to increase her popularity, Haru Urara is
helping to promote the shopping district. Always
eager to help out, she happily goes about her
tasks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I speak with the shopkeepers, they credit
her magnetic personality with revitalizing the
once-downtrodden district.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the course of our conversation, they tell
me that they don't care whether Haru Urara wins
or loses, as long as she's running down the track
happy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing this, I wonder if it's really a good idea if
that's all she races for.
